content.thinking:
Context usage is at 79% which exceeds the 60% threshold. The system is alerting that a new session should be started. But this is just a cron job running the context monitor. The user didn't send a message - this is an automated check.

Since context is at 79%, I should probably just note this but not take action unless needed. The cron job itself is just reporting status. I'll acknowledge the status but no need to proactively start a new session unless context gets critical.
